ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "pay_grade" TEXT /* Pay grade of the employee */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the employee is assigned */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the employee (e.g., Full Time, Part Time) */,
  "flsa_exempt" TEXT /* FLSA exemption status of the employee (Y/N) */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the employee is located */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee's employment ended (if applicable) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's direct supervisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee's home address */,
  "benefits_package" TEXT /* Description of the benefits package the employee receives */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Employee's performance rating */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_pay_grade FOREIGN KEY ("pay_grade") REFERENCES pay_grades ("pay_grade_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title FOREIGN KEY ("job_title") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_employment_status FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_flsa_exempt FOREIGN KEY ("flsa_exempt") REFERENCES flsa_exemptions ("flsa_exemption_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Description of the job responsibilities */,
  "required_education" TEXT /* Minimum required education for the job */,
  "required_experience" TEXT /* Minimum required experience for the job */,
  "job_category" TEXT /* Category of the job (e.g., Administrative, Technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_grades" (
  "pay_grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay grade */,
  "pay_grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the pay grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pay grade */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the pay grade */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the pay grade */,
  "step_increments" INTEGER /* Number of step increments within the pay grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pay_grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  "benefits_eligibility" TEXT /* Whether the employment status is eligible for benefits */,
  "leave_policy" TEXT /* Description of the leave policy for the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flsa_exemptions" (
  "flsa_exemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FLSA exemption */,
  "flsa_exemption_name" TEXT /* Name of the FLSA exemption */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the FLSA exemption */,
  "overtime_eligibility" TEXT /* Whether the FLSA exemption status is eligible for overtime pay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flsa_exemption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "ethnic_code" INTEGER /* Ethnic code of the employee */,
  "year_of_birth" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Veteran status of the employee */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_ethnic_code FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_code") REFERENCES ethnic_codes ("ethnic_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_codes" (
  "ethnic_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic code */,
  "ethnic_code_name" INTEGER /* Name of the ethnic code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnic code */,
  "percentage_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population represented by the ethnic code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_code_id")
)
